data.title: Work Permits for Foreign Investors
data.excerpt: Class A, B and C permits each have their own eli

content.introduction: Registering and running a compliant business in Tanzania touches BRELA, the TRA, sector regulators and your local council, and each of them keeps its own clock. This guide walks through the paperwork in the order the authorities actually expect it, flags the fees that change without much notice, and points out the deadlines that quietly trigger penalties if you miss them.
highlights: Reserve your name before you print anything
Budget for fees that change without notice
Diarise every statutory deadline the day you register
